title: Raccoon Removal in Greenpoint, Brooklyn | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Greenpoint, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving waterfront properties & historic buildings. Call today!
intro: Greenpoint's unique mix of historic rowhouses, converted warehouses, and waterfront properties creates ideal conditions for raccoon infestations. Whether raccoons are nesting in your attic on Franklin Street or raiding trash near McCarren Park, our expert team provides fast, humane removal services throughout this vibrant Brooklyn neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in complete raccoon solutions tailored to Greenpoint's diverse residential and commercial properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience serving Greenpoint residents with licensed, insured raccoon removal services that prioritize humane methods and permanent solutions. Our technicians understand the unique challenges of Greenpoint's older buildings and waterfront areas, providing same-day emergency response and comprehensive exclusion work to prevent future intrusions.
localContext: Greenpoint's proximity to Newtown Creek and the East River attracts raccoons seeking food and shelter, while the neighborhood's century-old buildings with mature trees and accessible rooflines provide perfect denning sites. From the historic homes near McGolrick Park to the industrial conversions along West Street, our team knows how to navigate Greenpoint's architectural diversity to deliver effective, lasting raccoon control.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Greenpoint typically costs between $900 and $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and required exclusion work. Single raccoon removal with basic sealing starts around $900, while comprehensive services including multiple animals, extensive damage repair, attic cleanup, and full-home exclusion can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Greenpoint properties.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons so common in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: Greenpoint's waterfront location near Newtown Creek and the East River provides abundant food sources for raccoons, while the neighborhood's mix of older buildings with accessible attics, mature tree coverage, and proximity to McCarren Park creates ideal habitats. The area's historic architecture often has gaps in soffits, vents, and rooflines that raccoons exploit for denning, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Greenpoint residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons pose several risks including rabies transmission, roundworm parasites in their feces, property damage from tearing through roofs and insulation, and aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young. Greenpoint residents should never approach or attempt to handle raccoons themselves. Our professional team uses humane, safe removal methods and proper protective equipment to eliminate health risks to your family and pets.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Greenpoint property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Greenpoint and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal timeline varies based on the situation—a single raccoon may be trapped within 1-3 days, while a mother with babies or multiple raccoons may require 1-2 weeks. After removal, we immediately perform exclusion work to seal all entry points and prevent re-entry, ensuring your Greenpoint home remains raccoon-free.
